Love Happens (2009)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $22,965,110Details
International Box Office $13,167,904
Worldwide Box Office $36,133,014
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $8,513,393
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $448,766
Total $8,962,159
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$8,057,010 (35.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.85 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:63.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$18,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:1,898 opening theaters/1,922 max. theaters, 4.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $36,621,699

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 18th, 2009 (Wide) by Universal
Video Release: February 2nd, 2010 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for some language including sexual references
Running Time: 119 minutes
Geographical setting: Seattle, WA
Plot point: Dating After the Death of a Romantic Partner, Death of a Son or Daughter, Depression, In-Laws / Future In-Laws, Inspirational Speaker, Romance, Widow/Widower, Writing and Writers
Social setting: Self-help movement
Subgenre: Romantic Drama
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Universal Pictures, Relativity Media, Stuber Pictures, Camp/Thompson Productions
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
